title: Michael J. Moody
text:
I am an incoming Physics PhD student at the University of Delaware. I recently completed undergraduate studies in physics and mathematics at the University of Maryland, Baltimore County.
    My research interests lie broadly in mathematical physics, open quantum systems, quantum information, quantum speed limits, and the use of geometric and analytic methods in quantum dynamics. I am especially interested in problems where physical intuition can be sharpened through rigorous mathematical structure.
    I am currently working on problems related to observable dynamics in open quantum systems, with emphasis on coherent and dissipative contributions to quantum speed limits.
